title: Lap-time delta shock transforms
summary: Expose positive, absolute, and normalized lap-time delta features as indicators of pace loss.
rationale: Pit decisions respond to pace degradation, not just physical tyre age. Strong preprocessing stacks preserved positive and absolute lap-time loss transforms.
implementation_hint: Add positive part of `LapTime_Delta`, absolute `LapTime_Delta`, signed and absolute ratios to `LapTime (s)`, and interactions with tyre age, compound expected life, and race phase.
expected_effect: Small to medium ROC AUC gain with medium confidence.
risk: Lap-time deltas may reflect traffic, safety-car, or weather effects rather than tyre wear; combine with field-relative context to reduce false signals.
